caption: The video captures a moment during a football match between Granada CF and Real Madrid, as indicated by the logos on the scoreboard. The scoreboard shows that Real Madrid is leading with a score of 2-0, with goals scored by F. Mendy at the 9th minute and Benzema at the 15th minute. The time displayed on the board is 45:00, suggesting that it is halftime, with an additional 2 minutes of extra time added. The setting appears to be a stadium with empty red seats visible in the foreground, indicating either a sparsely attended match or a section not open to spectators. The atmosphere seems calm, with no immediate action taking place on the field.
